mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reader_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reader_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}

SELECT rf.id AS follow_id, rf.create_time AS follow_time, r.id AS reader_id, r.reader_id AS reader_no, r.real_name, r.department FROM reader_follow rf LEFT JOIN reader r ON rf.follower_id = r.id WHERE rf.followee_id = #{followeeId} ORDER BY rf.create_time DESC

SELECT rf.id AS follow_id, rf.create_time AS follow_time, r.id AS reader_id, r.reader_id AS reader_no, r.real_name, r.department FROM reader_follow rf LEFT JOIN reader r ON rf.followee_id = r.id WHERE rf.follower_id = #{followerId} ORDER BY rf.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reader_follow WHERE followee_id = #{followeeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reader_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId}
